item.title: Major trailer crash leaves thousands of Coke bottles on freeway - crazy recovery
item.description: A massive trailer wreck scatters thousands of Coke bottles across the freeway in one unbelievable recovery scene.

media:content.media:title: Major trailer crash leaves thousands of Coke bottles on freeway - crazy recovery
media:content.media:description: A massive trailer wreck scatters thousands of Coke bottles across the freeway in one unbelievable recovery scene.

item.title: Tow Truck Gets stuck After Backhoe Rollover
item.description: What starts as a backhoe rollover recovery quickly gets worse when the tow truck ends up stuck too.

media:content.media:title: Tow Truck Gets stuck After Backhoe Rollover
media:content.media:description: What starts as a backhoe rollover recovery quickly gets worse when the tow truck ends up stuck too.

item.title: When no one understands each other mid chaos
item.description: In the middle of total chaos, crossed wires and confusion make the recovery even more intense.

media:content.media:title: When no one understands each other mid chaos
media:content.media:description: In the middle of total chaos, crossed wires and confusion make the recovery even more intense.

item.title: I cannot wait to show you guys the insane custom interior job EZ Pete Interiors is going to do for Hulk 2.0. Will be fully finished just in time for the Vegas tow show next month too
item.description: Get a first look at the wild custom interior transformation planned for Hulk 2.0 before its big Vegas tow show debut.

media:content.media:title: I cannot wait to show you guys the insane custom interior job EZ Pete Interiors is going to do for Hulk 2.0. Will be fully finished just in time for the Vegas tow show next month too
media:content.media:description: Get a first look at the wild custom interior transformation planned for Hulk 2.0 before its big Vegas tow show debut.

item.title: Rookie Driver Flips a Mixer Truck on the Freeway on his 1st Day!
item.description: A rookie driver’s very first day turns into a highway nightmare after flipping a massive mixer truck.

media:content.media:title: Rookie Driver Flips a Mixer Truck on the Freeway on his 1st Day!
media:content.media:description: A rookie driver’s very first day turns into a highway nightmare after flipping a massive mixer truck.

item.title: Trailer Falls off Semi on Freeway!
item.description: A sudden mishap sends a trailer crashing off a semi and onto a busy freeway

media:content.media:title: Trailer Falls off Semi on Freeway!
media:content.media:description: A sudden mishap sends a trailer crashing off a semi and onto a busy freeway

item.title: Rain mud and a truck buried alive
item.description: Relentless rain and thick mud trap a truck completely, turning it into a buried wreck

media:content.media:title: Rain mud and a truck buried alive
media:content.media:description: Relentless rain and thick mud trap a truck completely, turning it into a buried wreck
